articles.title: Meta To Lay Off 10% Of Workforce Amid Ongoing AI Push
articles.description: Meta, which owns Facebook, Instagram and WhatsApp, plans to lay off 10% of its workforce as it continues to invest in generative AI.

articles.title: The Potential Peril and Profit of Anthropic’s Mythos
articles.description: The artificial intelligence model has sparked fear on Wall Street. But the furor could eventually benefit its maker.
articles.content: Mythos, the already-famous AI model from Anthropic, has sparked fear across Wall Street, governments and pretty much everywhere else. It’s said to have the ability to scan miles of code for vulnerabilities and offer options to exploit them in complex... [619 chars]

articles.title: Google Maps Lets Filmmakers Scout Movie Scenes Using AI and Street View Data
articles.description: Google unveiled a new AI tool in Maps that lets filmmakers preview scenes in real-world locations ahead (or instead) of scouting trips.
articles.content:
Hollywood location scouts may soon be able to do more of their work from a laptop, thanks to artificial intelligence.

articles.title: Bret Taylor's Sierra buys YC-backed AI startup Fragment
articles.description: Sierra, the AI customer service agent startup founded by technologist Bret Taylor, announced today that it has acquired the YC-backed French startup Fragment.
